testcase.name: shouldApplyJitterAndThirtyMinuteCeilingForHigherRetryCount
testcase.system-out: 00:43:04.138 [main] ERROR com.falconx.wallet.producer.WalletOutboxDispatcher -- wallet.outbox.dispatch.failed eventId=evt-wallet-1003 eventType=wallet.deposit.confirmed retryCount=4 nextRetryAt=2026-04-19T01:08:53.136973+08:00 java.lang.IllegalStateException: still failing at testcase.name: shouldMarkWalletOutboxMessageAsFailedWhenPublishThrows
testcase.system-out: 00:43:04.142 [main] ERROR com.falconx.wallet.producer.WalletOutboxDispatcher -- wallet.outbox.dispatch.failed eventId=evt-wallet-1002 eventType=wallet.deposit.reversed retryCount=1 nextRetryAt=2026-04-19T00:43:10.142045+08:00 java.lang.IllegalStateException: mock publish failure at com.falconx.wallet.producer.WalletOutboxDispatcher.dispatchPendingMessages(WalletOutboxDispatcher.java:57) at
